page_metadata.biotools__summary: Library and API for manipulating large SNP datasets with associated meta-data, such as marker names, marker locations, individuals’ phenotypes, etc. in an I/O efficient binary file format.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Library and API for manipulating large SNP datasets with associated meta-data, such as marker names, marker locations, individuals’ phenotypes, etc. in an I/O efficient binary file format.
